label: Transparent evening primrose motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Evening Primrose transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete evening primrose bloom isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: Pale-yellow evening primrose petals, leaf-green stems, dusk meadow calm, crisp botanical edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no generic yellow flower, no vase, no hand, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Evening Primrose light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Evening Primrose, derived from pale-yellow petals, leaf green, and twilight blue.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
Style: calm evening app system with gentle cards, dusk surfaces, readable labels, 8px radii, and quiet status states.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Evening Primrose dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation of Morphous Evening Primrose with twilight-blue surfaces, pale-yellow actions, leaf-green status states, and calm evening app coverage.
Required visible sections: dark mode palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
